FILE.UPLOADED.description: Triggered when a file is uploaded to a folder

FILE.DOWNLOADED.description: Triggered when a file is downloaded

FILE.TRASHED.description: Triggered when a file is moved to the trash

FILE.DELETED.description: Triggered when a file is permanently deleted from the trash

FILE.RESTORED.description: Triggered when a file is restored from the trash

FILE.COPIED.description: Triggered when a file is copied to another location

FILE.MOVED.description: Triggered when a file is moved to a different folder

FILE.LOCKED.description: Triggered when a file is locked to prevent editing by others

FILE.UNLOCKED.description: Triggered when a locked file is unlocked

FILE.RENAMED.description: Triggered when a file is renamed

FOLDER.CREATED.description: Triggered when a new folder is created

FOLDER.RENAMED.description: Triggered when a folder is renamed

FOLDER.DELETED.description: Triggered when a folder is permanently deleted

FOLDER.COPIED.description: Triggered when a folder is copied to another location

FOLDER.MOVED.description: Triggered when a folder is moved to a different parent folder

FOLDER.TRASHED.description: Triggered when a folder is moved to the trash

COMMENT.CREATED.description: Triggered when a new comment is added to a file

COMMENT.UPDATED.description: Triggered when a comment on a file is edited

COMMENT.DELETED.description: Triggered when a comment is removed from a file

COLLABORATION.CREATED.description: Triggered when a new collaboration invitation is created for a file or folder

COLLABORATION.ACCEPTED.description: Triggered when a collaboration invitation is accepted

COLLABORATION.REJECTED.description: Triggered when a collaboration invitation is rejected

COLLABORATION.REMOVED.description: Triggered when a collaboration is removed from a file or folder

COLLABORATION.UPDATED.description: Triggered when a collaboration's role or permissions are changed

TASK_ASSIGNMENT.CREATED.description: Triggered when a new task assignment is created on a file

TASK_ASSIGNMENT.UPDATED.description: Triggered when a task assignment is updated (e.g. status changed to complete)

id.description: Unique identifier for this webhook event delivery

trigger.description: The trigger type that fired this webhook (e.g. FILE.UPLOADED, FOLDER.CREATED)

webhook.description: The webhook configuration that matched this event. Contains id and type

created_by.description: The user who performed the action that triggered the event. Contains type, id, name, and login (email)

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred

source.description: The resource that triggered the event. Contains type (file, folder, comment, collaboration, task_assignment), id, name, and additional type-specific fields such as parent, path_collection, sequence_id

additional_info.description: Additional context about the event, varies by trigger type. May include before and after values for renames, or collaboration details
